question: सामाजिक संपर्क प्रकार आणि धार्मिक किंवा जातीय गटांनुसार वर्गीकृत केलेल्या सरासरी मासिक घरगुती खर्चाचे आणि एकूण घरगुती संख्येचे विभाजन प्रदान करा, ज्याची क्रमवारी सर्वोच्च ते निम्न खर्चाप्रमाणे लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, T2.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE, AVG(T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS), COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, T2.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY AVG(T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.caste_religion_group_8_category, ds.social_network_contact_2_type, AVG(fhc.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs) AS avg_monthly_household_expenditure, COUNT(DISTINCT dh.household_id) AS total_households
FROM dim_household_social ds
JOIN dim_household dh ON ds.household_id = dh.household_id
JOIN fact_household_consumption fhc ON dh.household_id = fhc.household_id
GROUP BY ds.caste_religion_group_8_category, ds.social_network_contact_2_type
ORDER BY avg_monthly_household_expenditure DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.caste_religion_group_8_category, ds.social_network_contact_2_type, AVG(fhc.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs) AS avg_monthly_household_expenditure, COUNT(DISTINCT dh.household_id) AS total_households
FROM dim_household_social ds
JOIN dim_household dh ON ds.household_id = dh.household_id
JOIN fact_household_consumption fhc ON dh.household_id = fhc.household_id
GROUP BY ds.caste_religion_group_8_category, ds.social_network_contact_2_type

question: ग्रामीण जिल्ह्यांचे कोड ओळखा ज्यात किमान एक घरकुल आहे ज्याचा मासिक एकूण खर्च ५०० रुपयांपेक्षा कमी आहे, तर त्याच वेळी किमान एक घरकुल आहे ज्याचा अन्नेतर मासिक खर्च २,००० रुपयांपेक्षा जास्त आहे, जिल्हा कोडानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS < 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 AND MAX(T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) > 2000 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dgh.district_code
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_household_consumption fhc ON dgh.geography_id = fhc.geography_id
WHERE dgh.census_2001_urban_rural ILIKE 'Rural'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_household_consumption fhc_low
    WHERE fhc_low.geography_id = dgh.geography_id
      AND fhc_low.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs < 500
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_household_consumption fhc_high
    WHERE fhc_high.geography_id = dgh.geography_id
      AND fhc_high.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs > 2000
  )
ORDER BY dgh.district_code;

  )
ORDER BY dgh.district_code;
